ddls:
CREATE TABLE "streamers" (
  "streamer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streamer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the streamer */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the streamer's profile image */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken by the streamer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the streamer */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of links to the streamer's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the streamer's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the streamer's account was last updated */,
  "is_partner" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the streamer is a Twitch partner */,
  "is_affiliate" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the streamer is a Twitch affiliate */,
  "streamer_type" TEXT /* Type of streamer (e.g., solo, team, brand) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("streamer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the channel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the channel was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the channel (e.g., gaming, music, art) */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the channel is verified */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views on the channel */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Total number of followers on the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stream */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel the stream belongs to */,
  "streamer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the streamer who created the stream */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the stream */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the stream */,
  "watch_time" INTEGER /* Total watch time of the stream */,
  "stream_time" INTEGER /* Total stream time */,
  "peak_viewers" INTEGER /* Peak number of viewers */,
  "average_viewers" INTEGER /* Average number of viewers */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the stream */,
  "game" TEXT /* Name of the game being streamed */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the stream */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Total number of likes for the stream */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Total number of comments for the stream */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the stream is live */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the stream was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the stream was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streams_streamer_id FOREIGN KEY ("streamer_id") REFERENCES streamers ("streamer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streams_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "streamer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the streamer the follower is following */,
  "follower_name" TEXT /* Name of the follower */,
  "follower_since" TEXT /* Date the follower started following the streamer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the follower started following the streamer */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the follower's data was last updated */,
  "is_subscriber" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the follower is a subscriber */,
  "subscription_tier" TEXT /* Tier of the subscription (e.g., Tier 1, Tier 2, Tier 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_streamer_id FOREIGN KEY ("streamer_id") REFERENCES streamers ("streamer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follower_gains" (
  "gain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower gain event */,
  "streamer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the streamer who gained followers */,
  "gain_date" TEXT /* Date the followers were gained */,
  "followers_gained" INTEGER /* Number of followers gained */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the follower gain event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the follower gain event data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follower_gains_streamer_id FOREIGN KEY ("streamer_id") REFERENCES streamers ("streamer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stream the view belongs to */,
  "viewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the viewer */,
  "view_time" TEXT /* Date the view occurred */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view in seconds */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the view was for a live stream */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the view was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the view data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "view_gains" (
  "gain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view gain event */,
  "streamer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the streamer who gained views */,
  "gain_date" TEXT /* Date the views were gained */,
  "views_gained" INTEGER /* Number of views gained */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the view gain event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the view gain event data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_view_gains_streamer_id FOREIGN KEY ("streamer_id") REFERENCES streamers ("streamer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partnerships" (
  "partnership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partnership */,
  "streamer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the streamer who is partnered */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the partner */,
  "partner_since" TEXT /* Date the partnership started */,
  "partnership_type" TEXT /* Type of partnership (e.g., brand, sponsor, affiliate) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the partnership ends */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the partnership was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the partnership data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partnership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partnerships_streamer_id FOREIGN KEY ("streamer_id") REFERENCES streamers ("streamer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maturity_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maturity rating */,
  "streamer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the streamer who has a maturity rating */,
  "maturity_rating" TEXT /* Maturity rating of the streamer */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the maturity rating was assigned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the maturity rating was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the maturity rating data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maturity_ratings_streamer_id FOREIGN KEY ("streamer_id") REFERENCES streamers ("streamer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., streamer performance, user activity) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report data was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
